title: Low Ink
description: Low ink is a Splatoon tournament that is aimed at newer and lower level competitive teams. Our goal is to give teams a chance to get into the competitive scene and gain experience. High level teams may be barred from playing to preserve our ideology.

title: SuperJump
description: The Inkling Performance Labs Major! A tournament for all players and skill levels.

title: Swim or Sink
description: Swim or Sink is a weekly tournament series aimed at providing players with practice against other teams.

title: From the Ink Up
description: From the Ink Up is a ~Division 7-11 skill capped tournament taking place biweekly on Friday evenings.

title: Splat World Series
description: Splatoon 3's international supermajor. Presented in collaboration with AREA CUP!

title: Global Gauntlet
description: Splatoon 3's international exchange event. Presented in collaboration with AREA CUP!
